description.value: Aura faint divination; CL 2nd; Slot eye; Price 3,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION When worn, these innocent-looking spectacles convert any written language to one known by the wearer, as the comprehend languages spell. The glasses are also good at detecting falsified documents, granting their wearer a +5 bonus to Linguistics checks to identify forgeries and the ability make such checks untrained. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, comprehend languages; Cost 1,500 gp.
